data[0]  = 32'b10000000000000000000_00001_0110111; // lui  x1, 0x80000
data[1]  = 32'b000000000001_00000_000_00010_0010011; // addi x2, x0, 1

data[2]  = 32'b0000000_00010_00001_000_00011_0110011; // add  x3, x1, x2
data[3]  = 32'b0100000_00001_00010_000_00100_0110011; // sub  x4, x2, x1
data[4]  = 32'b0000000_00010_00010_001_00101_0110011; // sll  x5, x2, x2
data[5]  = 32'b0000000_00010_00001_010_00110_0110011; // slt  x6, x1, x2
data[6]  = 32'b0000000_00010_00001_011_00111_0110011; // sltu x7, x1, x2
data[7]  = 32'b0000000_00010_00001_100_01000_0110011; // xor  x8, x1, x2
data[8]  = 32'b0000000_00010_00001_101_01001_0110011; // srl  x9, x1, x2
data[9]  = 32'b0100000_00010_00001_101_01010_0110011; // sra  x10, x1, x2
data[10] = 32'b0000000_00010_00001_110_01011_0110011; // or   x11, x1, x2
data[11] = 32'b0000000_00010_00001_111_01100_0110011; // and  x12, x1, x2
data[12] = 32'b0000000_00010_00010_000_00000_0110011; // add  x0, x2, x2

data[13] = 32'b0000100_00011_00000_010_00000_0100011; // sw x3, 128(x0)
data[14] = 32'b0000100_00100_00000_010_00100_0100011; // sw x4, 132(x0)
data[15] = 32'b0000100_00101_00000_010_01000_0100011; // sw x5, 136(x0)
data[16] = 32'b0000100_00110_00000_010_01100_0100011; // sw x6, 140(x0)
data[17] = 32'b0000100_00111_00000_010_10000_0100011; // sw x7, 144(x0)
data[18] = 32'b0000100_01000_00000_010_10100_0100011; // sw x8, 148(x0)
data[19] = 32'b0000100_01001_00000_010_11000_0100011; // sw x9, 152(x0)
data[20] = 32'b0000100_01010_00000_010_11100_0100011; // sw x10, 156(x0)
data[21] = 32'b0000101_01011_00000_010_00000_0100011; // sw x11, 160(x0)
data[22] = 32'b0000101_01100_00000_010_00100_0100011; // sw x12, 164(x0)
data[23] = 32'b0000101_00000_00000_010_01000_0100011; // sw x0, 168(x0)
